nav.register_desc: Ara-t-k s ara tettekkev di tudert ta$arimt n Bordj El Kiffan.
nav.register_success: Ara yettwazen. La tjammu lemlak n umsefrak.

home.hero_badge: Tamdint n Bordj El Kiffan — Lezzayer
home.hero_desc: Enqe$ $ef wuguren-ik, ddu-d s yidebîi, tekki deg yisenfar u tettkellek $ef tnekra n tamdint-ik.
home.hero_devize: « Akken i rebah n yi$arimen d tmurt »
home.admin_card_role: Aqerru n usenfar d umsefrak ameqran
home.cta_desc: Ugar n {{count}} n yi$arimen ay yettekkan. Dan-ik d ayen ilan asen!
home.module_signalements_desc: Enqe$ $ef wuguren n wudren, tifat, taflanut d tizedmin.
home.module_propositions_desc: Ddu-d s yidebîi-ik n usuyem u nuzen $ef yufraren.
home.module_projets_desc: Tekki deg yisenfar yerzan ttekki-d $ef tnekra-nsen.
home.module_entraide_desc: Efk ne$ ddem tallelt tabakkant, tqelbt ne$ tamassant.

footer.brand_desc: Aserwes yettekkan i yimen-nniḍen n Bordj El Kiffan i unqis, ufkar d ttekki di tnekra n tamdint-nsen.
footer.devize: « Akken i rebah n yi$arimen d tmurt »
footer.admin_role: Aqerru n usenfar d umsefrak ameqran
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Tabburt ta$arimt n Bordj El Kiffan. Akk izrgiven qqimen.
footer.made_with: Yettwaxdem s ❤️ i yi$arimen n BEK

guide.title: Amawah n u$arim
guide.desc: Akk ay ilaq a t-tissinev i useqdec n Tabburt ta$arimt n Bordj El Kiffan
guide.s1_desc: Ldi imettaye-ik $ef yal ameǧǧar (Aselkim, talwit, ammu) u sewl-ed ar useɣwen.
guide.s1_step3: Asebter ageffan ad d-idban akked uzli n tunyef $ef ufella
guide.s1_tip: Asebter yettawi ~30 s ii ttekki. ma yella ur t-izer yiwen di 15 n dq. Smiri tikkelt-nniḍen mbaad 30 s.
guide.s2_desc: Enqe$ $ef wugur deg tamdint: wudren, tifat, taflanut, tisedment, atg.
guide.s3_desc: Degger asuyem i tamdint u ddem tallelt yi$arimen-nniḍen.
guide.s4_desc: Rnu ar yisenfar yerzan: ajezziq amatun, talist, ardilm aselkan...
guide.s5_desc: Ddu-d s usem$i-ik, leghwal-ik, ne$ suter tallelt i ljamea.
guide.s6_desc: Efk nnesqa i usefrek n tebburt d wuguren-is i$arimen.
guide.s7_desc: Id d amaslan unsib n ljamea n BEK i wesgod i tengit-ik tudrist.
guide.s8_desc: Slem  $el lrrad-ik ne$ amedu i ljamea n BEK meôr.
guide.cta_desc: Rnu ar yi$arimen yettarra-n tagi deg Bordj El Kiffan
